name: kodevu
description: Poll SVN revisions or Git commits, send each change diff to a reviewer CLI, and write Markdown review reports.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/review-runner.js && node --check src/svn-client.js && node --check src/git-client.js && node --check src/vcs-client.js && node --check src/shell.js
